# Steadfast Cleaning Co.

> Family-operated residential house cleaning company serving Tampa Bay, Florida. Woman-owned and Latino-owned, licensed, bonded, and insured. Owner Inmarie Garcia runs every walk-through personally. Rated 5.0 on Google. Bilingual service available (Hablamos Espanol).

## Contact

- Phone and text: (813) 330-0225
- Email: info@steadfastcleanco.com
- Website: https://steadfastcleanco.com
- Google Business Profile: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Steadfast+Cleaning+Co./@27.9628674,-82.512656,15z/data=!4m8!3m7!1s0x6433416195a5b9a3:0x999554e478a82e29!8m2!3d27.9628674!4d-82.512656!9m1!1b1!16s%2Fg%2F11zbc3hztv
- Hours: 7 days a week, 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM
- We respond to estimate requests within 24 hours. In-home estimates are free.

## Service Area

Based in Westchase, Tampa, FL. Serving the greater Tampa Bay area, including South Tampa, Hyde Park, Davis Islands, Bayshore Beautiful, Palma Ceia, Beach Park, Westchase, Carrollwood, Town 'N' Country, New Tampa, Wesley Chapel, Land O' Lakes, Lutz, Odessa, Brandon, Riverview, Fishhawk Ranch, Apollo Beach, St. Petersburg, and Clearwater.

## Services and Starting Prices

All prices are starting rates for whole-home cleaning. Final flat-rate pricing is confirmed after a free in-home walk-through.

- Recurring Cleaning (biweekly baseline): 1 bed 1 bath $115, 2 bed 2 bath $150, 3 bed 2 bath $180, 4 bed 3 bath $225 per visit. Weekly service is 10% off. Monthly service adds $20 per visit. Every recurring client's first visit is a full deep clean at no extra charge.
- One-Time Clean: from $155 (1 bed) to $305 (4 bed), no commitment required.
- Deep Cleaning: included as the first visit of every recurring plan. More thorough than a standard clean, reaching baseboards, light fixtures, vents, grout, appliance exteriors, and detailed scrubbing of bathrooms and kitchens. Most Tampa homes need one as the first service and again every 3 to 4 months given the humid climate.
- Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning: from $250. Full empty-unit detail including inside oven, fridge, cabinets, closets, interior windows, and wall spot cleaning.
- Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Turnover: from $160 per turnover. Linen change, full clean, restock check, and same-day turnaround for back-to-back bookings.
- Post-Construction Cleaning: $0.30 per sq ft, minimum $350. Drywall dust, paint overspray, debris removal, and full detail of renovated spaces.
- Additional bathrooms beyond two add $20 to $40 per visit depending on count.

## Policies and Guarantees

- Satisfaction guaranteed: if anything is not right, the team returns within 24 hours and fixes it, no questions asked.
- Same trained, background-checked cleaners every visit. No rotating crews.
- Licensed, bonded, and insured. Certificate of insurance available on request.
- Eco-friendly, fragrance-free, or client-supplied products available on request.
- New client special: book a first Deep Clean and get $25 off the first recurring service.
